framework.name: 10% Higher ROI with CAIO Role
framework.description: Organizations with Chief AI Officers report 10% higher ROI on AI spend according to IBM research. 26% of enterprises now have CAIOs, up from 11% two years earlier, suggesting governance leadership impacts success.
framework.raw_quote: 26% of enterprises now have Chief AI Officers, reporting 10% higher ROI

source.title: Enterprise AI Adoption Strategy: Complete 2025 Guide
